name: Meatless Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the vegetable burgers into a mixing bowl.
2. Use your fingers to work in the breadcrumbs, salt, and pepper until combined.
3. Set aside.
4. Melt the butter in a frying pan and sauté the onion until transparent.
5. Mix the milk and beaten egg together.
6. Add the parsley, soy sauce, and the crumbled vegetable burgers to the milk mixture. Stir well to combine.
7. Gradually add the onion mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring thoroughly.
8. Shape the mixture into 24 small balls.
9. Heat the veg oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
10. Fry the meatless balls until they are well browned all over.
Good source of protein.
